name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions Nginx as a reverse proxy with multiple SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local), including self-signed TLS certificate generation, security hardening via UFW firewall, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, SSH hardening, and kernel-level sysctl tuning.

name: cache
description: Deploys a dual caching layer consisting of Memcached and Redis (with password authentication), including a ruby_block post-processing hack to strip deprecated directives from the Redis configuration file generated by the redisio Supermarket cookbook.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI application by installing system packages, cloning source code from GitHub, creating a Python virtual environment, provisioning a PostgreSQL database and user, generating a .env secrets file, and registering a systemd service unit running uvicorn.
